raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is fully reachable by the right arm and there is unobstructed lateral access; the surrounding table area is clear so the claw can approach from the side.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and removed from the tabletop, freeing space in front of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_front_right_of_box_2",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Robot is holding the cup and the front-right region of the table is free of obstacles.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the specified table region, safely away from the manipulation zone of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been moved away; there is at least 15 cm of free space to the right of box_2 to accommodate the push, and the left side of box_2 is accessible.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a visible gap between box_1 and box_2 and eliminating lateral contact between them."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A clear gap exists around box_1 on both sides; both arms can approach the box’s lateral faces without obstruction from other objects or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors are in firm symmetric contact with the left and right faces of box_1, enabling secure control of the box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is firmly grasped and there is sufficient overhead clearance to lift it at least 5 cm without collision with the table or nearby objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is lifted clear of the tabletop and held steadily in the robot’s dual-arm grasp, fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is fully reachable by the right arm and there is unobstructed lateral access; the surrounding table area is clear so the claw can approach from the side.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and removed from the tabletop, freeing space in front of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: Robot is holding the cup and the front-right region of the table is free of obstacles.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the specified table region, safely away from the manipulation zone of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been moved away; there is at least 15 cm of free space to the right of box_2 to accommodate the push, and the left side of box_2 is accessible.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a visible gap between box_1 and box_2 and eliminating lateral contact between them.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear gap exists around box_1 on both sides; both arms can approach the box’s lateral faces without obstruction from other objects or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors are in firm symmetric contact with the left and right faces of box_1, enabling secure control of the box.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is firmly grasped and there is sufficient overhead clearance to lift it at least 5 cm without collision with the table or nearby objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is lifted clear of the tabletop and held steadily in the robot’s dual-arm grasp, fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box.
